name: WH40K TTS Mod — Solo Edition
description:
A complete standalone Warhammer 40,000 10th Edition toolkit. No other mods required. Paste Global.lua into your table's Global Lua Script slot.

🎲 DICE ROLLER
Panel with presets (D6, 2D6, D3, Scatter) and free NdS input. Tag any object DiceMat and physical dice rolled on it auto-announce results + sum to all players.

⚔ ATTACK SEQUENCE
Full Hit → Wound → Save → Damage calculator. AP applied automatically. Damage supports flat, D3, D6.

🛡 ARMOUR SAVE & 💀 BATTLESHOCK
Multi-dice save roller with AP. Battleshock test (Ld + models lost vs 2D6).

⏱ TURN TRACKER
6 WH40K phases with round counter and army cycling (!next / !prev).

❤ WOUND TRACKER
Model-aware HP — damage fills the front model first; overflow carries. Up to 12 units.

👥 TEAMS & MATCH FORMATS
Six formats: FFA, 2v1, 2v2, 3v2, 3v3, 3-Team. Auto-assign or set manually.

📜 YELLOSCRIBE RULES BROWSER
In-game browser for yelloscribe.com. 🌐 Fetch Stats from Page auto-fills M/T/Sv/W/Ld/OC. 📌 Pin Page pre-fills unit name from URL.

⚡ STRATAGEMS
Save stratagems manually or import from BattleScribe XML. Each spawns as an amber notecard on the player's side table.

📥 BATTLESCRIBE / NEW RECRUIT IMPORT
Paste .ros XML → instant data cards + stratagem notecards. Use ForgeOrg or your preferred army manager for HP tracking.

⚖ MODEL SCALING
Scale all minis to 100% / 75% / 50%. Original sizes always preserved.

🪑 PLAYER SIDE TABLES
Six colour-coded mats around the perimeter. Data cards and strat notecards spawn here.

⚑ SURRENDER
Confirmation panel — removes staged models, data cards, and stratagems for that player.

🔒 HOST-ONLY MODE
Lock all controls to the server host. HP tracking stays open for all players.

≡ TOOLBAR TOGGLE — hide/show toolbar at any time.

FTC COMPATIBLE — auto-detects Free the Codex if loaded alongside this mod.
FORGEORG COMPATIBLE — no shared globals or event hook collisions.

Type !help in chat for the full command reference. All state persists across save/load.
change_note: v1.4.0 — BattleScribe data card import, Fetch Stats from Page, ForgeOrg compatible
